2026-04-23T02:51:48.5519212Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5520104Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5520834Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5521697Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5522204Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5522602Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5522859Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5523164Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5523453Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5523850Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5524204Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5524700Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T02:51:48.5525138Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

The README therefore has no `Snippet:` placeholders for `Update-Snippets.ps1` to populate.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n#### Fix the wrong service description in `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`\n\nEdit the file. Replace:\n\n```markdown\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\n```\n\nWith:\n\n```markdown\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Data Box resources, enabling you to create and monitor Data Box jobs that transfer large amounts of data to and from Azure.\n```\n\n#### Add DataBox-specific Key Concepts in `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`\n\nReplace the existing \"Key concepts\" section body with:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nThe following are the main resource types exposed by this library:\n\n- **DataBoxJob** – Represents a Data Box order. A job tracks the full lifecycle of a data-transfer request: validation, device shipment, data copy, and upload to Azure storage.\n- **Job stages** – A `DataBoxJobStage` describes the current phase of a job (e.g., `DeviceOrdered`, `DeviceDelivered`, `DataCopied`, `Completed`).\n- **DataBoxBasicJobDetails** – Contains configuration details for a job, including the data copy settings, contact information, and shipping address.\n- **Shipping address** – A `DataBoxShippingAddress` describes where the physical device should be shipped.\n\nKey concepts of the Azure Resource Manager client library for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n#### 2a. Create a sample test file\n\nCreate the file `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/tests/Samples/Sample1_DataBoxJob.cs` with content:\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox.Models;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_DataBoxJob : SamplesBase\u003cDataBoxManagementTestEnvironment\u003e\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [SyncOnly]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task CreateDataBoxJob()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:CreateDataBoxJob\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n            string jobName = \"myDataBoxJob\";\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.WestUS;\n\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = client.GetSubscriptionResource(\n                SubscriptionResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId));\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            DataBoxJobCollection jobs = resourceGroup.GetDataBoxJobs();\n\n            // Build job details (DataBox device, storage account destination)\n            var jobDetails = new DataBoxJobDetails(\n                new DataBoxContactDetails(\n                    contactName: \"Test User\",\n                    phone: \"1234567890\",\n                    emailList: new[] { \"test@example.com\" }),\n                new DataBoxShippingAddress(\n                    streetAddress1: \"1 Microsoft Way\",\n                    city: \"Redmond\",\n                    stateOrProvince: \"WA\",\n                    country: \"US\",\n                    postalCode: \"98052\"),\n                new DataBoxDataDestinationDetails(\n                    storageAccountId: new ResourceIdentifier(\n                        $\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/mystorageaccount\")));\n\n            var jobData = new DataBoxJobData(location, jobDetails);\n            ArmOperation\u003cDataBoxJobResource\u003e operation = await jobs.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed, jobName, jobData);\n            DataBoxJobResource job = operation.Value;\n\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created job: {job.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [SyncOnly]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task ListDataBoxJobs()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ListDataBoxJobs\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = client.GetSubscriptionResource(\n                SubscriptionResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId));\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            DataBoxJobCollection jobs = resourceGroup.GetDataBoxJobs();\n\n            await foreach (DataBoxJobResource job in jobs.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Job: {job.Data.Name} — Status: {job.Data.Status}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n#### 2b. Add snippet placeholders to `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`\n\nIn the **Examples** section, replace the existing content with:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create a DataBox job\n\n```C# Snippet:CreateDataBoxJob\n```\n\n### List DataBox jobs in a resource group\n\n```C# Snippet:ListDataBoxJobs\n```\n\nFor more code samples, see [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples).\n```\n\n(Note: each fenced block above should use triple backticks as normal markdown fences in the actual README file.)\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README currently has most required sections but is missing or thin in:\n\n| Section | Status | Action |\n|---|---|---|\n| Getting started \u003e Install | ✅ Present | No change |\n| Getting started \u003e Prerequisites | ✅ Present | No change |\n| Getting started \u003e Authenticate | ✅ Present | No change |\n| Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic only | Replace with DataBox-specific content (Step 1 above) |\n| Examples | ⚠️ Link-only, no code | Add snippet placeholders (Step 2b above) |\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ Present | No change |\n| Next steps | ✅ Present | No change |\n| Contributing | ✅ Present | No change |\n\nUse `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` as the canonical reference for section formatting and tone.\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun these commands in order:\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 databox` — injects snippet code from `#region Snippet:` tags into README placeholders; verify with `git diff`\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 databox` — regenerates public API listing files (no new public types expected, but run to be safe)\n5. `dotnet format sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\n","title":"[DataBox] Docs: README has stale copy-paste content and missing service-specific examples"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

2026-04-23T02:54:22.4232502Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4232620Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox`
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4232801Z **Service directory:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4232936Z **Triggered by:** commit 96635cf97 (#58496) by @azure-sdk
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4232940Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4233021Z ## What Changed
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4233025Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4233759Z Commit #58496 added the `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox` management library to the repository, including generated resource types (`DataBoxJobResource`, `DataBoxJobCollection`), custom model extensions, and a README/CHANGELOG.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4233764Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4233845Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4233849Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4234801Z - **Wrong service description:** The README states _"This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources."_ — this is stale copy-paste from a different package and is factually incorrect for DataBox.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4235498Z - **No DataBox-specific Key Concepts:** The "Key concepts" section only contains a generic link; it does not describe DataBox-specific concepts (job types, data copy configurations, job stages, shipping/transfer workflows).
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4236111Z - **No inline code examples:** The "Examples" section only links to a generic samples page with no DataBox-specific code showing how to create, list, or manage DataBox jobs.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237097Z - **No test-backed README snippets:** There is no `tests/Samples/` directory with snippet-annotated test methods; only auto-generated samples exist under `tests/Generated/Samples/`. The README therefore has no `Snippet:` placeholders for `Update-Snippets.ps1` to populate.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237103Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237174Z <details>
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237397Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237408Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237737Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237741Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237828Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4237832Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238096Z #### Fix the wrong service description in `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238101Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238186Z Edit the file. Replace:
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238190Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238262Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238469Z This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238536Z ```
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238540Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238609Z With:
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238613Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4238680Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239191Z This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Data Box resources, enabling you to create and monitor Data Box jobs that transfer large amounts of data to and from Azure.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239259Z ```
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239263Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239527Z #### Add DataBox-specific Key Concepts in `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239531Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239668Z Replace the existing "Key concepts" section body with:
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239676Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239748Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239821Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239824Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4239999Z The following are the main resource types exposed by this library:
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4240003Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4240635Z - **DataBoxJob** – Represents a Data Box order. A job tracks the full lifecycle of a data-transfer request: validation, device shipment, data copy, and upload to Azure storage.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4241141Z - **Job stages** – A `DataBoxJobStage` describes the current phase of a job (e.g., `DeviceOrdered`, `DeviceDelivered`, `DataCopied`, `Completed`).
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4241681Z - **DataBoxBasicJobDetails** – Contains configuration details for a job, including the data copy settings, contact information, and shipping address.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242055Z - **Shipping address** – A `DataBoxShippingAddress` describes where the physical device should be shipped.
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242060Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242502Z Key concepts of the Azure Resource Manager client library for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242575Z ```
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242579Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242671Z ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242675Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242767Z #### 2a. Create a sample test file
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4242772Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4243097Z Create the file `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/tests/Samples/Sample1_DataBoxJob.cs` with content:
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4243101Z 
2026-04-23T02:54:22.4243174Z ```csharp
